instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `min-max-let` that evaluates two expressions exactly once each, binds the smaller to a user-named min variable and the larger to a user-named max variable, and runs body in their scope.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (FIRST XS)) (#:G2 (CAR (LAST XS))))
            (LET ((LO (MIN #:G1 #:G2)) (HI (MAX #:G1 #:G2)))
              (LIST LO HI)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (FIRST XS)) (#:G113 (CAR (LAST XS))))
            (LET ((LO (MIN #:G112 #:G113)) (HI (MAX #:G112 #:G113)))
              (LIST LO HI)))

--- stderr ---
